datasets.name: ds_job_run_timeline
queryLines:
SELECT 
  t1.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(t1.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  t1.job_id, 
  t1.run_id, 
  t1.period_start_time, 
  t1.period_end_time, 
  t1.result_state
FROM system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline t1
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON t1.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
WHERE t1.result_state IS NOT NULL
  AND t1.period_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS

datasets.name: ds_job_run_cost_agg
queryLines:
WITH jobs_usage_with_list_cost AS (
  SELECT t1.*,
         t1.usage_quantity * list_prices.pricing.default * 0.73 AS list_cost
  FROM system.billing.usage t1
  INNER JOIN system.billing.list_prices list_prices
    ON t1.cloud = list_prices.cloud
   AND t1.sku_name = list_prices.sku_name
   AND t1.usage_start_time >= list_prices.price_start_time
   AND (t1.usage_end_time <= list_prices.price_end_time OR list_prices.price_end_time IS NULL)
  WHERE t1.sku_name LIKE '%JOBS%'
    AND usage_date >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
),
jobs_usage_per_workspace AS (
  SELECT workspace_id, SUM(list_cost) AS list_cost
  FROM jobs_usage_with_list_cost GROUP BY ALL
)
SELECT
  t1.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(t1.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT t1.job_id)  AS num_jobs,
  COUNT(DISTINCT t1.run_id)  AS num_runs,
  FIRST(t2.list_cost)        AS list_cost
FROM system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline t1
LEFT JOIN jobs_usage_per_workspace t2 USING (workspace_id)
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON t1.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
WHERE period_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
GROUP BY ALL
ORDER BY list_cost DESC

datasets.name: ds_highest_failure_jobs
queryLines:
WITH terminal_statuses AS (
  SELECT workspace_id, job_id,
    CASE WHEN result_state IN ('ERROR','FAILED','TIMED_OUT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_failure,
    period_end_time AS last_seen_date
  FROM system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline
  WHERE result_state IS NOT NULL
    AND period_end_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
),
most_recent_jobs AS (
  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY workspace_id, job_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) AS rn
  FROM system.lakeflow.jobs QUALIFY rn = 1
)
SELECT
  FIRST(t2.name)                                                    AS name,
  t1.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(t1.workspace_id AS STRING))       AS workspace_name,
  t1.job_id,
  COUNT(*)                                                          AS runs,
  SUM(is_failure)                                                   AS failures,
  (1 - COALESCE(TRY_DIVIDE(SUM(is_failure), COUNT(*)), 0)) * 100    AS success_ratio,
  MAX(t1.last_seen_date)                                            AS last_seen_date
FROM terminal_statuses t1
LEFT JOIN most_recent_jobs t2 USING (workspace_id, job_id)
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON t1.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
GROUP BY ALL
ORDER BY failures DESC

datasets.name: ds_long_running_jobs
queryLines:
WITH job_runs AS (
  SELECT
    workspace_id,
    job_id,
    run_id,
    period_start_time,
    period_end_time,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, period_start_time, period_end_time) AS duration_minutes,
    result_state
  FROM system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline
  WHERE period_end_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
    AND period_end_time IS NOT NULL
    AND period_start_time IS NOT NULL
    AND result_state IS NOT NULL
),
most_recent_jobs AS (
  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY workspace_id, job_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) AS rn
  FROM system.lakeflow.jobs QUALIFY rn = 1
)
SELECT
  FIRST(j.name) AS name,
  jr.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(jr.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  jr.job_id,
  COUNT(*) AS total_runs,
  ROUND(AVG(jr.duration_minutes), 2) AS avg_duration_minutes,
  MAX(jr.duration_minutes) AS max_duration_minutes,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY jr.duration_minutes), 2) AS p95_duration_minutes,
  MAX(jr.period_end_time) AS last_run_time
FROM job_runs jr
LEFT JOIN most_recent_jobs j ON jr.workspace_id = j.workspace_id AND jr.job_id = j.job_id
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON jr.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
GROUP BY jr.workspace_id, jr.job_id, workspace_name
HAVING AVG(jr.duration_minutes) >= 10
ORDER BY avg_duration_minutes DESC
LIMIT 50

datasets.name: ds_most_expensive_jobs
queryLines:
WITH list_cost_per_job AS (
  SELECT
    t1.workspace_id,
    t1.usage_metadata.job_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t1.usage_metadata.job_run_id) AS runs,
    SUM(t1.usage_quantity * list_prices.pricing.default * 0.73) AS list_cost,
    FIRST(identity_metadata.run_as, TRUE) AS run_as,
    MAX(t1.usage_end_time) AS last_seen_date
  FROM system.billing.usage t1
  INNER JOIN system.billing.list_prices list_prices
    ON t1.cloud = list_prices.cloud
   AND t1.sku_name = list_prices.sku_name
   AND t1.usage_start_time >= list_prices.price_start_time
   AND (t1.usage_end_time <= list_prices.price_end_time OR list_prices.price_end_time IS NULL)
  WHERE t1.sku_name LIKE '%JOBS%'
    AND t1.usage_metadata.job_id IS NOT NULL
    AND t1.usage_date >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAY
  GROUP BY ALL
),
most_recent_jobs AS (
  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY workspace_id, job_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) AS rn
  FROM system.lakeflow.jobs QUALIFY rn = 1
)
SELECT
  t2.name,
  t1.job_id,
  t1.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(t1.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  t1.runs,
  t1.run_as,
  SUM(t1.list_cost) AS list_cost,
  t1.last_seen_date
FROM list_cost_per_job t1
LEFT JOIN most_recent_jobs t2 USING (workspace_id, job_id)
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON t1.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
GROUP BY ALL
ORDER BY list_cost DESC

datasets.name: ds_billing_30_60_days
queryLines:
WITH jobs_usage_with_list_cost AS (
  SELECT t1.*,
         t1.usage_quantity * list_prices.pricing.default * 0.73 AS list_cost
  FROM system.billing.usage t1
  INNER JOIN system.billing.list_prices list_prices
    ON t1.cloud = list_prices.cloud
   AND t1.sku_name = list_prices.sku_name
   AND t1.usage_start_time >= list_prices.price_start_time
   AND (t1.usage_end_time <= list_prices.price_end_time OR list_prices.price_end_time IS NULL)
  WHERE t1.sku_name LIKE '%JOBS%'
)
SELECT
  sku_name,
  SUM(list_cost) AS spend,
  SUM(CASE WHEN usage_end_time BETWEEN DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), -30) AND CURRENT_DATE()                 THEN list_cost ELSE 0 END) AS Last30DaySpend,
  SUM(CASE WHEN usage_end_time BETWEEN DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), -60) AND DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), -31) THEN list_cost ELSE 0 END) AS Last30to60DaySpend,
  TRY_DIVIDE(
    SUM(CASE WHEN usage_end_time BETWEEN DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), -30) AND CURRENT_DATE()                 THEN list_cost ELSE 0 END)
    - SUM(CASE WHEN usage_end_time BETWEEN DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), -60) AND DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), -31) THEN list_cost ELSE 0 END),
    SUM(CASE WHEN usage_end_time BETWEEN DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), -60) AND DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), -31) THEN list_cost ELSE 0 END)
  ) * 100 AS Last30DayGrowth
FROM jobs_usage_with_list_cost
GROUP BY ALL

datasets.name: ds_pipeline_updates
queryLines:
WITH most_recent_pipelines AS (
  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY workspace_id, pipeline_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) AS rn
  FROM system.lakeflow.pipelines QUALIFY rn = 1
)
SELECT
  u.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(u.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  u.pipeline_id,
  p.name                      AS pipeline_name,
  u.update_id,
  u.update_type,
  u.period_start_time,
  u.period_end_time
FROM system.lakeflow.pipeline_update_timeline u
LEFT JOIN most_recent_pipelines p USING (workspace_id, pipeline_id)
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON u.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
WHERE u.period_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
ORDER BY u.period_start_time DESC

datasets.name: ds_pipeline_failures
queryLines:
WITH most_recent_pipelines AS (
  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY workspace_id, pipeline_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) AS rn
  FROM system.lakeflow.pipelines QUALIFY rn = 1
)
SELECT
  u.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(u.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  u.pipeline_id,
  p.name AS pipeline_name,
  COUNT(*)       AS failed_updates
FROM system.lakeflow.pipeline_update_timeline u
LEFT JOIN most_recent_pipelines p USING (workspace_id, pipeline_id)
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON u.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
WHERE u.period_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
  AND UPPER(u.update_type) IN ('FAILED','CANCELED')
GROUP BY ALL
ORDER BY failed_updates DESC

datasets.name: ds_clusters_active
queryLines:
WITH latest_cluster_records AS (
  SELECT
    c.*,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.cluster_id ORDER BY c.change_time DESC) AS rn
  FROM system.compute.clusters c
  WHERE c.delete_time IS NULL
)
SELECT
  c.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(c.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  c.cluster_id,
  c.cluster_name,
  c.owned_by,
  c.cluster_source,
  c.driver_node_type,
  c.worker_node_type,
  c.worker_count,
  c.min_autoscale_workers,
  c.max_autoscale_workers,
  c.auto_termination_minutes,
  c.create_time,
  c.dbr_version
FROM latest_cluster_records c
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON c.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
WHERE c.rn = 1
ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

datasets.name: ds_billing_daily_timeseries
queryLines:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('DAY', usage_start_time)                               AS day,
  billing_origin_product,
  t1.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(t1.workspace_id AS STRING))       AS workspace_name,
  ROUND(SUM(usage_quantity * list_prices.pricing.default * 0.73), 2)       AS list_cost
FROM system.billing.usage t1
INNER JOIN system.billing.list_prices list_prices
  ON t1.cloud = list_prices.cloud
 AND t1.sku_name = list_prices.sku_name
 AND t1.usage_start_time >= list_prices.price_start_time
 AND (t1.usage_end_time <= list_prices.price_end_time OR list_prices.price_end_time IS NULL)
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON t1.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
WHERE t1.usage_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
ORDER BY 1

datasets.name: ds_idle_cluster_waste
queryLines:
WITH latest_cluster_records AS (
  SELECT
    c.*,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.cluster_id ORDER BY c.change_time DESC) AS rn
  FROM system.compute.clusters c
)
SELECT
  c.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(c.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  c.cluster_id,
  c.cluster_name,
  c.owned_by,
  c.cluster_source,
  c.driver_node_type,
  c.worker_node_type,
  c.worker_count,
  c.auto_termination_minutes,
  c.create_time,
  c.delete_time,
  ROUND(DATEDIFF(HOUR, c.create_time, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()) / 24.0, 1) AS days_alive,
  CASE
    WHEN c.auto_termination_minutes IS NULL THEN 'NO AUTO-TERMINATION ⚠️'
    WHEN c.auto_termination_minutes > 120 THEN 'EXCESSIVE TIMEOUT (>2h)'
    ELSE 'OK'
  END AS risk_level
FROM latest_cluster_records c
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON c.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
WHERE c.rn = 1
  AND c.delete_time IS NULL
  AND c.cluster_source IN ('UI', 'API')
  AND (c.auto_termination_minutes IS NULL OR c.auto_termination_minutes > 120)
ORDER BY days_alive DESC

datasets.name: ds_job_failure_root_cause
queryLines:
WITH most_recent_jobs AS (
  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY workspace_id, job_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) AS rn
  FROM system.lakeflow.jobs QUALIFY rn = 1
),
failed_runs AS (
  SELECT
    t.workspace_id,
    t.job_id,
    t.run_id,
    t.result_state,
    t.period_end_time,
    t.period_start_time
  FROM system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline t
  WHERE t.result_state IN ('FAILED', 'ERROR', 'TIMED_OUT')
    AND t.period_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
)
SELECT
  j.name AS job_name,
  f.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(f.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  f.result_state AS failure_state,
  COUNT(*) AS failure_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT f.run_id) AS affected_runs,
  MAX(f.period_end_time) AS last_failure_time,
  MIN(f.period_start_time) AS first_failure_time
FROM failed_runs f
LEFT JOIN most_recent_jobs j ON f.workspace_id = j.workspace_id AND f.job_id = j.job_id
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON f.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
HAVING failure_count >= 3
ORDER BY failure_count DESC
LIMIT 50

datasets.name: ds_cluster_startup_time
queryLines:
WITH cluster_events AS (
  SELECT
    workspace_id,
    cluster_id,
    cluster_name,
    cluster_source,
    driver_node_type,
    worker_node_type,
    create_time,
    change_time,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, create_time, change_time) AS startup_seconds
  FROM system.compute.clusters
  WHERE create_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
    AND change_time IS NOT NULL
    AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, create_time, change_time) BETWEEN 10 AND 3600
)
SELECT
  c.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(c.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  c.cluster_source,
  c.driver_node_type,
  c.worker_node_type,
  COUNT(*) AS cluster_count,
  ROUND(AVG(c.startup_seconds), 1) AS avg_startup_seconds,
  ROUND(MIN(c.startup_seconds), 1) AS min_startup_seconds,
  ROUND(MAX(c.startup_seconds), 1) AS max_startup_seconds,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c.startup_seconds), 1) AS p95_startup_seconds
FROM cluster_events c
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON c.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY avg_startup_seconds DESC

datasets.name: ds_dbu_consumption_forecast
queryLines:
WITH daily_dbu AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('DAY', usage_start_time) AS usage_day,
    workspace_id,
    SUM(usage_quantity) AS daily_dbus
  FROM system.billing.usage
  WHERE usage_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 60 DAYS
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),
stats AS (
  SELECT
    workspace_id,
    AVG(daily_dbus) AS avg_daily_dbus,
    STDDEV(daily_dbus) AS stddev_daily_dbus,
    MIN(daily_dbus) AS min_daily_dbus,
    MAX(daily_dbus) AS max_daily_dbus
  FROM daily_dbu
  WHERE usage_day >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
  GROUP BY workspace_id
)
SELECT
  s.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(s.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  ROUND(s.avg_daily_dbus, 2) AS avg_daily_dbus,
  ROUND(s.stddev_daily_dbus, 2) AS stddev_daily_dbus,
  ROUND(s.min_daily_dbus, 2) AS min_daily_dbus,
  ROUND(s.max_daily_dbus, 2) AS max_daily_dbus,
  ROUND(s.avg_daily_dbus * 7, 2) AS forecast_7day_dbus,
  ROUND(s.avg_daily_dbus * 30, 2) AS forecast_30day_dbus,
  ROUND(s.avg_daily_dbus * 30 * 0.73, 2) AS forecast_30day_list_cost
FROM stats s
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON s.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
ORDER BY avg_daily_dbus DESC

datasets.name: ds_inactive_workspaces
queryLines:
WITH workspace_activity AS (
  SELECT
    workspace_id,
    MAX(period_end_time) AS last_job_run
  FROM system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline
  WHERE period_end_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 90 DAYS
  GROUP BY workspace_id
),
workspace_clusters AS (
  SELECT
    workspace_id,
    MAX(create_time) AS last_cluster_created,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cluster_id) AS total_clusters
  FROM system.compute.clusters
  WHERE create_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 90 DAYS
  GROUP BY workspace_id
)
SELECT
  w.workspace_id,
  w.workspace_name,
  wa.last_job_run,
  wc.last_cluster_created,
  wc.total_clusters,
  DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), COALESCE(wa.last_job_run, wc.last_cluster_created)) AS days_inactive,
  CASE
    WHEN DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), COALESCE(wa.last_job_run, wc.last_cluster_created)) > 60 THEN 'HIGHLY INACTIVE (>60 days)'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), COALESCE(wa.last_job_run, wc.last_cluster_created)) > 30 THEN 'INACTIVE (>30 days)'
    ELSE 'LOW ACTIVITY'
  END AS activity_status
FROM system.access.workspaces_latest w
LEFT JOIN workspace_activity wa ON w.workspace_id = wa.workspace_id
LEFT JOIN workspace_clusters wc ON w.workspace_id = wc.workspace_id
WHERE COALESCE(wa.last_job_run, wc.last_cluster_created) IS NOT NULL
  AND DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), COALESCE(wa.last_job_run, wc.last_cluster_created)) >= 15
ORDER BY days_inactive DESC

datasets.name: ds_anomaly_detection
queryLines:
WITH daily_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('DAY', period_start_time) AS activity_date,
    workspace_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT job_id) AS job_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT run_id) AS run_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN result_state IN ('FAILED', 'ERROR') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failure_count
  FROM system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline
  WHERE period_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),
workspace_baseline AS (
  SELECT
    workspace_id,
    AVG(run_count) AS avg_runs,
    STDDEV(run_count) AS stddev_runs,
    AVG(failure_count) AS avg_failures,
    STDDEV(failure_count) AS stddev_failures
  FROM daily_metrics
  GROUP BY workspace_id
)
SELECT
  dm.activity_date,
  dm.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(dm.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  dm.job_count,
  dm.run_count,
  dm.failure_count,
  ROUND(wb.avg_runs, 1) AS baseline_avg_runs,
  ROUND(wb.avg_failures, 1) AS baseline_avg_failures,
  CASE
    WHEN dm.run_count > wb.avg_runs + (2 * wb.stddev_runs) THEN 'HIGH RUN VOLUME SPIKE 🔺'
    WHEN dm.failure_count > wb.avg_failures + (2 * wb.stddev_failures) THEN 'HIGH FAILURE SPIKE ⚠️'
    WHEN dm.run_count < wb.avg_runs - (2 * wb.stddev_runs) THEN 'UNUSUALLY LOW ACTIVITY 📉'
    ELSE 'NORMAL'
  END AS anomaly_type
FROM daily_metrics dm
JOIN workspace_baseline wb ON dm.workspace_id = wb.workspace_id
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON dm.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
WHERE (dm.run_count > wb.avg_runs + (2 * wb.stddev_runs)
   OR dm.failure_count > wb.avg_failures + (2 * wb.stddev_failures)
   OR dm.run_count < wb.avg_runs - (2 * wb.stddev_runs))
  AND dm.activity_date >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
ORDER BY dm.activity_date DESC, dm.workspace_id

datasets.name: ds_job_drift_detection
queryLines:
WITH job_duration_history AS (
  SELECT
    workspace_id,
    job_id,
    run_id,
    period_start_time,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, period_start_time, period_end_time) AS duration_minutes,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id, job_id ORDER BY period_start_time DESC) AS recency_rank
  FROM system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline
  WHERE period_end_time >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
    AND period_end_time IS NOT NULL
    AND period_start_time IS NOT NULL
    AND result_state = 'SUCCEEDED'
),
job_baseline AS (
  SELECT
    workspace_id,
    job_id,
    AVG(duration_minutes) AS avg_duration,
    STDDEV(duration_minutes) AS stddev_duration,
    COUNT(*) AS run_count
  FROM job_duration_history
  WHERE recency_rank > 5
  GROUP BY workspace_id, job_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
),
recent_runs AS (
  SELECT
    workspace_id,
    job_id,
    AVG(duration_minutes) AS recent_avg_duration,
    MAX(period_start_time) AS last_run_time
  FROM job_duration_history
  WHERE recency_rank <= 5
  GROUP BY workspace_id, job_id
),
most_recent_jobs AS (
  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY workspace_id, job_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) AS rn
  FROM system.lakeflow.jobs QUALIFY rn = 1
)
SELECT
  j.name AS job_name,
  jb.workspace_id,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_name, CAST(jb.workspace_id AS STRING)) AS workspace_name,
  jb.job_id,
  ROUND(jb.avg_duration, 2) AS baseline_avg_minutes,
  ROUND(rr.recent_avg_duration, 2) AS recent_avg_minutes,
  ROUND(((rr.recent_avg_duration - jb.avg_duration) / jb.avg_duration) * 100, 1) AS drift_percentage,
  jb.run_count AS baseline_run_count,
  rr.last_run_time,
  CASE
    WHEN rr.recent_avg_duration > jb.avg_duration + (2 * jb.stddev_duration) THEN 'PERFORMANCE DEGRADATION ⚠️'
    WHEN rr.recent_avg_duration > jb.avg_duration * 1.5 THEN 'SIGNIFICANT SLOWDOWN 🐌'
    WHEN rr.recent_avg_duration < jb.avg_duration * 0.5 THEN 'UNEXPECTED SPEEDUP 🚀'
    ELSE 'NORMAL VARIANCE'
  END AS drift_status
FROM job_baseline jb
JOIN recent_runs rr ON jb.workspace_id = rr.workspace_id AND jb.job_id = rr.job_id
LEFT JOIN most_recent_jobs j ON jb.workspace_id = j.workspace_id AND jb.job_id = j.job_id
LEFT JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest w ON jb.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
WHERE ABS((rr.recent_avg_duration - jb.avg_duration) / jb.avg_duration) > 0.25
ORDER BY ABS(drift_percentage) DESC
LIMIT 50

frame.description: Stacked by result state across all workspaces

frame.description: Forecasts DBU consumption and costs based on 30-day averages. Helps with budget planning and capacity management.

frame.title: Highest Failure Jobs — Last 30 Days
frame.description: Jobs ranked by failure count. Ordered by most failures first.

frame.title: Most Expensive Jobs — Last 30 Days
frame.description: Ordered by highest $list cost in the last 30 days.

frame.title: Long Running Jobs — Last 30 Days
frame.description: Jobs with average duration ≥ 10 minutes, ordered by average duration. Shows avg, max, and P95 execution times.

frame.title: 🔧 Job Failure Root Cause Analysis
frame.description: Top failure patterns to reduce support tickets. Shows jobs with 3+ failures in last 30 days.

frame.title: 📈 Job Drift Detection
frame.description: Detects performance drift by comparing last 5 runs vs baseline (10+ older runs). Shows >25% performance changes.

frame.title: Daily Pipeline Update Status — Last 30 Days
Active Clusters Across All Workspaces
frame.description: All clusters that have not been deleted (delete_time IS NULL)

frame.title: ⚠️ Idle Cluster Waste - Immediate Cost Savings
frame.description: Interactive clusters with no auto-termination or excessive timeout (>2 hours). These are potential cost waste.

frame.title: ⚡ Cluster Startup Time Analysis
frame.description: Measures actual cluster startup times by configuration. Shows avg and P95 startup seconds (30-day view).

frame.title: 📊 DBU Consumption Forecast
frame.description: Forecasts DBU consumption and costs based on 30-day averages. Helps with budget planning and capacity management.

frame.title: 💤 Inactive Workspaces
frame.description: Workspaces with 15+ days of inactivity. Consider cleanup or consolidation to optimize costs.

frame.title: 🚨 Anomaly Detection - Unusual Activity
frame.description: Detects unusual patterns using 2-sigma thresholds: high run volume spikes, failure spikes, or low activity (last 7 days).
